query: What happens if I go to an out of network dentist?
answer:
Benefits for out-of-network dental services are available if referred by a participating provider and specifically authorized.

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Referrals | The Participating Provider may refer you to a Specialist or Non-Participating Provider for Covered Services. Benefits for Covered Services provided by a Specialist or Non-Participating Provider are available under this plan only if: • The Participating Provider refers you; • The Covered Services are specifically authorized by the Participating Provider’s referral; and • The Covered Services are listed as covered in the What Are My Benefits? section and are not otherwise limited or excluded. 1 Willamette Dental Plan January 1, 2024 1000016 |
